papers.title: Characterization and Expression Patterns of Auxin Response Factors in Wheat
papers.authors: Qiao L, Zhang W, Li X, Zhang L, Zhang X, Li X, Guo H, Ren Y, Zheng J, Chang Z

papers.title: TaARF4 genes are linked to root growth and plant height in wheat
papers.authors: Wang J, Wang R, Mao X, Li L, Chang X, Zhang X, Jing R

papers.title: Expansins: roles in plant growth and potential applications in crop improvement
papers.authors: Marowa P, Ding A, Kong Y

edges.mechanism: Auxin binds TIR1/AFB F-box; auxin-TIR1 recruits Aux/IAA for ubiquitination
edges.evidence_sentence: When present, auxin promotes the TIR1/AFB-mediated ubiquitin-proteasome-dependent degradation of inhibitory Aux/IAA proteins

edges.mechanism: TIR1-auxin targets Aux/IAA proteins for proteasomal degradation
edges.evidence_sentence: TIR1/AFB-mediated ubiquitin-proteasome-dependent degradation of inhibitory Aux/IAA proteins

edges.mechanism: Aux/IAA proteins bind and repress ARF transcription factors; removed upon auxin signaling
ARF transcription factors activate growth/elongation genes; TaARF4 associated with height QTL
edges.evidence_sentence: TaARF4-B was strongly associated with PH and root depth at the tillering, jointing and grain fill stages

edges.mechanism: TaARF4-A regulates HB33 expression; HB33 represses GH3 genes and reduces plant height
edges.evidence_sentence: TaARF4-A was shown to regulate HB33 expression which negatively responded to ABA, and reduced root length and plant height by repressing expression of Gretchen Hagen 3 (GH3) genes

edges.mechanism: HB33 represses GH3 gene expression; GH3 genes conjugate auxin to reduce active auxin
edges.evidence_sentence: HB33 expression which negatively responded to ABA, and reduced root length and plant height by repressing expression of Gretchen Hagen 3 (GH3) genes

edges.mechanism: Auxin promotes expansin expression to loosen cell walls
edges.evidence_sentence: Expansin expression is influenced by hormones like abscisic acid, indole-3-acetic acid (auxins), brassinosteroids, cytokinins and ethylene

edges.mechanism: GA promotes expansin expression to drive cell elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: expansin expression is influenced by hormones like abscisic acid, indole-3-acetic acid (auxins), brassinosteroids, cytokinins and ethylene

edges.mechanism: BR promotes expansin expression in growing tissues
edges.evidence_sentence: expansin expression is influenced by hormones like abscisic acid, indole-3-acetic acid (auxins), brassinosteroids, cytokinins and ethylene

edges.mechanism: Expansins break H-bonds between cellulose microfibers and xyloglucan, allowing cell wall extension
edges.evidence_sentence: break the hydrogen bonds between cellulose microfibers and cross-linking matrix glycans, resulting in slippage between cell walls
action enables cell wall polymers to slide and consequently allowing the cell to expand

edges.mechanism: Expansin OE in rice increases height; analogous role in wheat
edges.evidence_sentence: plants carrying a single copy of the OsEXP4 gene grew taller than control plants and developed some additional leaves

perturbations.evidence_sentence: Wheat seedlings treated with 10 μM α-naphthaleneacetic acid (synthetic auxin) showed differential upregulation and downregulation of specific TaARF members within 0.5-3 hours post-treatment
TaARF4-B was strongly associated with PH and root depth at the tillering, jointing and grain fill stages
perturbations.notes: Natural variation haplotype (T→A at 158); associated with shorter plants
